content:
# Shopify Polaris - Overview

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

Visual traits:
- merchant-focused
- scannable
- status-rich
- actionable
- admin

Use when:
- commerce admin
- orders list
- products list
- resource management
- bulk actions

Avoid when:
- static comparison table
- small card list
- marketing page

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.

# Shopify Polaris - Layout Rules

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

- Use an index table for collections of same-type resources that link to detail pages.
- Support sorting/filtering for long lists and pagination for large collections.
- Right-align numeric cells and expose status with badges or clear text.

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.

# Shopify Polaris - Component Patterns

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

- resource row
- selectable row
- bulk action bar
- filters
- sorting
- pagination
- status badge
- loading state
- empty state

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.

# Shopify Polaris - Interaction States

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

- selected
- disabled row
- loading
- empty
- sorted
- filtered
- bulk selection

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.

# Shopify Polaris - Accessibility Notes

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

- Rows and subheaders need explicit relationships when grouping selectable resources.
- Keyboard multi-selection and row actions should remain operable.

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.

# Shopify Polaris - Implementation Hints

Page type: data_table
Use cases: commerce admin, orders list, products list, resource management, bulk actions
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/tables/index-table

- Use for admin pages where each row represents a business object.
- Do not make a table passive if the main task is navigation to resource details.
- Separate UI state from sorting/filtering network logic.

AI summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.
